name: ClickHouse Cloud
description: Cloud-native analytical database. Monitor organizations and service deployments.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to ClickHouse Cloud console at https://console.clickhouse.cloud
2. Go to API Keys in the left menu
3. Click New API Key
4. Set a name, choose Admin or Developer permissions, and set expiration
5. Copy the Key ID and Key Secret (shown only once)
6. Enter them below

checks.name: ClickHouse Cloud App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the ClickHouse Cloud API is accessible.

checks.name: ClickHouse Cloud Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to ClickHouse Cloud via API.
